mapper.select: select case when sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) is null then 0 else sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) end as dailyIncrement, case when sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) is null then 0 else sum(TABLE_ALL_COUNT) end as dataTotalVolume from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.delete: delete from DGN_PROPERTY_LARGE where type = #{type} and Save_flag=#{saveFlag}
mapper.select: select secondary_organization_ch as name ,count(distinct table_name_en) as tableCount, sum(YESTERDAY_COUNT) as tableDataVolume from table_organization_assets where primary_organization_ch ='原始库' and statistics_time >= to_date(#{dateStr},'yyyy-MM-dd') group by secondary_organization_ch

select distinct secondaryClassifyCh from(select v1.codeid as mainClassifyId , v1.codetext as mainClassifyCh , v2.codeid as primaryClassifyId , v2.codetext as primaryClassifyCh , v3.codeid as secondaryClassifyId , v3.codetext as secondaryClassifyCh from (select CODEID, CODENAME, CODETEXT, PARCODEID from v_classify_info where codetext = '数据组织分类' ) v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.codeid = v2.PARCODEID left join v_classify_info v3 on v2.codeid = v3.PARCODEID) where primaryClassifyCh = '原始库'

select c.field_class as fieldClassId, c.valtext as fieldClassCh, count(distinct a.objectid) as tableCount from (SELECT s.field_class, s.fieldid, b.valtext FROM (select field_class, fieldid from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where field_class is not null and deleted = 0) s left join (select valvalue, valtext from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid = 'JZCODEGAZDFL') b on s.field_class = b.valvalue) c left join (select fieldid, objectid from synlte.objectfield where deleted = 0) a on c.fieldid = a.fieldid group by valtext, field_class

select count(distinct a.objectid) as tableCount from (SELECT s.field_class, s.fieldid, b.valtext FROM (select field_class, fieldid from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where field_class is not null and deleted = 0) s left join (select valvalue, valtext from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid = 'JZCODEGAZDFL') b on s.field_class = b.valvalue) c left join (select fieldid, objectid from synlte.objectfield where deleted = 0) a on c.fieldid = a.fieldid
select valvalue as fieldClassId, valtext as fieldClassCh, 0 as tableCount from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid = 'JZCODEGAZDFL'

select tableNameEn, tableCount as useHeatCount, case when name is null then tablename else name end showName from (select distinct project || '.' || tablename as tableNameEn, project, tablename, tableCount, name from (select l.project, l.tablename, sum(l.table_use_count) as tableCount from UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT l INNER JOIN synlte.object r on upper(l.TABLENAME) = upper(r.TABLENAME) group by l.project, l.tablename) s1 left join (select table_name_en, table_project, name from (select row_number() over(partition by table_name_en, table_project order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) rn, table_name_en, table_project, name from table_organization_assets) where rn = 1) s2 on upper(s1.project) = upper(s2.table_project) and upper(s1.tablename) = upper(s2.table_name_en) order by tableCount desc) where rownum <= 5

select appid as tableNameEn , sysname as showName, useSum as useHeatCount from( select t.areaid, t.organname, t.appid, t.sysname, sum(t.incr) as useSum from v_sysoper_log_incr t where t.sysname is not null group by t.areaid, t.organname, t.appid, t.sysname order by useSum desc ) where rownum <= 5
select si_citycode as dz, count(distinct SD_ID) as totalTypes, sum(si_count) as totalcount from STANDARDIZE.STATINFODIS where si_updatetime >= to_date(#{todayStr} , 'yyyyMMdd') group by si_citycode
select city_code from(select city_code from bscdata.city where pro_id = (select pro_id from bscdata.province where pro_name = #{provinceName} and rownum = 1) order by city_code asc ) where rownum = 1
select count(*) from di_job where jobstatus != 'deleted'
select count(*) from synlte.object_store_info osi where import_flag = 1
select CITY_ABB as cityAbb ,CITY_CODE as cityCode , CITY_NAME as cityName from DGN_CITY_ABB

select DATA,CREATE_TIME as createTime,TYPE,SAVE_FLAG as saveFlag from( select DATA,CREATE_TIME,TYPE,SAVE_FLAG,ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by type order by save_flag desc) as num from DGN_PROPERTY_LARGE ) where num =1

select sum(c.totalNums) as allCount, sum(totalSize) as allSize from (select secondary_organization_ch as label, count(*) as tables, case when sum(table_all_count) is null or sum(table_all_count) = '' then 0 else trunc(sum(table_all_count) / 100000000, 0) end as totalNums, case when sum(table_size) is null or sum(table_size) = '' then 0 else trunc(sum(table_size) / 1073741824, 0) end as totalSize from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and primary_organization_ch = '原始库' and table_type = 'odps' group by secondary_organization_ch) c

select case when sum(tableallcount) is null or sum(tableallcount) = '' then 0 else trunc(trunc(sum(tableallcount) / 100000000, 0) / (#{days} + 1), 0) end as allCount, case when sum(tablesize) is null or sum(tablesize) = '' then 0 else trunc(trunc(sum(tablesize) / 1073741824, 0) / (#{days} + 1), 0) end as allSize, case when sum(partitioncount) is null or sum(partitioncount) = '' then 0 else trunc(trunc(sum(partitioncount) / 100000000, 0) / (#{days} + 1), 0) end as partitionAllCount, case when sum(partitionsize) is null or sum(partitionsize) = '' then 0 else trunc(trunc(sum(partitionsize) / 1073741824, 0) / (#{days} + 1), 0) end as partitionAllSize from (select sta.tabletype, sta.tableallcount, sta.tablesize, sta.partitioncount, sta.partitionsize, sta.inserteddatatime, ciad.primaryorganizationch from (select * from synlte.syndmg_table_all where to_char(to_date(inserteddatatime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), 'yyyyMMdd') >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL ' #{days} day', 'yyyyMMdd')) sta left join (select distinct sjxjbm, tablename, primaryorganizationch, firstorganizationch, secondaryorganizationch, primarydatasourcech, secondarydatasourcech from classify_interface_all_date) ciad on upper(sta.tablename) = upper(ciad.tablename)) a where primaryorganizationch = '原始库' and tabletype in (1, 5, 12)

select partitionAllCount, partitionAllSize, to_char(to_date(insertDate, 'yyyyMMdd'), 'MM/dd') as insertDate from (select case when sum(partitioncount) is null or sum(partitioncount) = '' then 0 else trunc(sum(partitioncount) / 100000000, 0) end as partitionAllCount, case when sum(partitionsize) is null or sum(partitionsize) = '' then 0 else trunc(sum(partitionsize) / 1073741824, 0) end as partitionAllSize, to_char(to_date(inserteddatatime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), 'yyyyMMdd') as insertDate from (select sta.tabletype, sta.tableallcount, sta.tablesize, sta.partitioncount, sta.partitionsize, sta.inserteddatatime, ciad.primaryorganizationch from (select * from synlte.syndmg_table_all where to_char(to_date(inserteddatatime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), 'yyyyMMdd') >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '#{days} day', 'yyyyMMdd')) sta left join (select distinct sjxjbm, tablename, primaryorganizationch, firstorganizationch, secondaryorganizationch, primarydatasourcech, secondarydatasourcech from classify_interface_all_date) ciad on upper(sta.tablename) = upper(ciad.tablename)) a where primaryorganizationch = '原始库' and tabletype in (1, 5, 12) group by to_char(to_date(inserteddatatime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), 'yyyyMMdd') order by to_char(to_date(inserteddatatime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), 'yyyyMMdd') asc) x

select c.label as label, d.tables as tables, c.totalNums as totalNums from (select secondary_organization_ch as label, count(*) as tables, case when sum(table_all_count) is null or sum(table_all_count) = '' then 0 else trunc(sum(table_all_count) / 100000000, 0) end as totalNums from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and secondary_organization_ch in ('原始汇集库', '原始标准库') and lower(table_type) = 'odps' group by secondary_organization_ch) c left join (select secondary_organization_ch as label, count(*) as tables from (select distinct table_name_en, secondary_organization_ch from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and secondary_organization_ch in ('原始汇集库', '原始标准库') and lower(table_type) = 'odps') group by secondary_organization_ch) d on c.label = d.label union all select a.label as label, b.tables as tables, a.totalNums as totalNums from (select primary_organization_ch as label, count(*) as tables, case when sum(table_all_count) is null or sum(table_all_count) = '' then 0 else trunc(sum(table_all_count) / 100000000, 0) end as totalNums from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and primary_organization_ch in ('资源库', '主题库', '知识库', '业务库') and lower(table_type) = 'odps' group by primary_organization_ch) a left join (select primary_organization_ch as label, count(*) as tables from (select distinct table_name_en, primary_organization_ch from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and primary_organization_ch in ('资源库', '主题库', '知识库', '业务库') and lower(table_type) = 'odps') group by primary_organization_ch) b on a.label = b.label

select jobname as warnName, '执行失败' as warnContent, to_char(maxTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') as warnTime from (select jobname, max(createtime) maxTime from di_job_batch_record where status = 'fail' and createtime >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) group by jobid, jobname) order by maxTime desc

select label, count(*) as value, className from (select table_name_en, vci.codetext as label, case when o.secretlevel = '01' then '公开' when o.secretlevel = '02' then '一般' when o.secretlevel = '03' then '重要' when o.secretlevel = '04' then '特殊' else '其他' end as className from (select distinct table_name_en,datasource_last_level from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and secondary_organization_ch in ('原始汇集库') and lower(table_type) = 'odps') toa left join synlte.object o on upper(toa.table_name_en) = upper(o.tablename) left join v_classify_info vci on toa.datasource_last_level = vci.codeid) x where x.className != '其他' and x.label is not null group by label, className

select '来源单位' as label, count(*) as value,'个' as unit from (select distinct routine_code as value from ds_detected_table where routine_code is not null) a union all select '来源系统' as label, count(*) as value,'个' as unit from (select distinct app_code from ds_detected_table where app_code is not null) b

select operator_net as operatorNet , data_type as dataType, sum(records_all) as recordsAll from( select operator_net ,data_type,records_all, row_number() over(partition by tablename||'_'||data_type||'_'||operator_net||'_'||netmode||'_'||citycode order by partition desc) rn from DGN_INSPECT_OPERATORS ) where rn =1 and operator_net is not null group by operator_net,data_type

select l.name,l.standTableCount, case when r.tableCount is null then 0 else r.tableCount end as tableCount, case when r.tableDataVolume is null then 0 else r.tableDataVolume end as tableDataVolume from ( select secondaryorganizationch as name ,count(distinct tablename) as standTableCount from classify_interface_all_date where upper(sjyjfl) = 'JZCODEGASJZZFL'||#{type} group by secondaryorganizationch ) l left join ( select sub_organization_name as name , sum(object_count) as tableCount, sum(records_all) as tableDataVolume from(select l.organization_type, l.sub_organization_name, l.object_count,l.records_all,row_number() over(partition by organization_type||'_'||sub_organization_type||'_'||valvalue order by partition desc) rn from dgn_inspect_organization_stat l where organization_type = #{type} ) where rn = 1 and sub_organization_name is not null group by sub_organization_name) r on l.name = r.name

select SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as name, sum(yesterday_count) as tableCount from (select row_number() over(partition by table_name_en, table_project order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) rn, table_name_en, table_project, yesterday_count, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH from table_organization_assets where to_char(STATISTICS_TIME, 'yyyyMMdd') = #{dateStr} and PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '原始库') where rn = 1 group by SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH
mapper.delete: delete from dgn_inspect_organization_stat where to_date(partition,'yyyy-mm-dd') < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '15 day')
delete from DGN_INSPECT_OPERATORS where to_date(partition,'yyyy-mm-dd') < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '15 day')
delete from DGN_DISTRIBUTION_STATISTIC where to_date(STATISTICTIME,'yyyy-mm-dd') < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '15 day')
mapper.select: select distinct labelcode,labelname from synlte.labels where labellevel = #{level}

select l.name,l.tableCount, case when tableDataVolume is null then 0 else tableDataVolume end as tableDataVolume from(select secondaryorganizationch as name ,count(distinct tablename) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date where primaryorganizationch = '原始库' group by secondaryorganizationch ) l left join (select SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as name, sum(table_all_count) as tableDataVolume from (select row_number() over(partition by table_name_en, table_project order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) rn, table_name_en, table_project, table_all_count, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH from table_organization_assets where STATISTICS_TIME >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') and PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '原始库') where rn = 1 group by SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH ) r on l.name = r.name

SELECT NAME,tableCount, CASE WHEN tableDataVolume IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE tableDataVolume END AS tableDataVolume FROM( SELECT name, count(distinct TABLENAME) as tableCount, sum(table_all_count) as tableDataVolume FROM(select r.project_name,l.TABLENAME , case when r1.labelname is null then l.sjzybq5 else r1.labelname end as name from( select DISTINCT sjxjbm, TABLENAME ,sjzybq5 from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where sjzybq5 is not null and zyzt = '1' and sjxjbm is not null and substr(upper(sjxjbm),0,11) ='JZ_RESOURCE' AND UPPER(SJZZYJFL)='JZCODEGASJZZFL05' ) l inner join (select tablename ,tableid ,objectname from synlte.OBJECT where deleted = 0 and relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) o on upper(l.sjxjbm) = upper(o.tableid) left join (select project_name, tablename from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where project_name IS NOT NULL AND substr(upper(project_name),0,4) = 'YSK_') r on upper(l.TABLENAME) = upper(r.tablename) left join (select distinct labelcode,labelname from synlte.labels where labellevel = 5) r1 on upper(l.sjzybq5) = upper(r1.labelcode) ) ll left JOIN ( SELECT table_name_en , table_project, table_all_count FROM ( (select row_number() over(partition by table_name_en, table_project order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) rn, table_name_en,table_all_count,TABLE_PROJECT from table_organization_assets where STATISTICS_TIME > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2 day') )) where rn = 1) rr ON upper(ll.project_name) = upper(rr.TABLE_PROJECT) and upper(ll.TABLENAME) = upper(rr.table_name_en) group by name)

select tableNameEn, tableNameCh, tableCount, tableSize from ( select lower(tableNameEn) as tableNameEn, case when l.tableNameCh is not null then l.tableNameCh else r.objectname end as tableNameCh, tableCount, tableSize from ( select distinct table_project || '.' || table_name_en as tableNameEn, trim(name) as tableNameCh, table_name_en, to_number(table_all_count) as tableCount, table_size as tableSize from table_organization_assets where statistics_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and table_name_en is not null and table_all_count is not null and lower(table_type) in ('odps', 'hive', 'hdfs') ) l inner join ( select objectname,tablename from synlte.object where objectstate = 1 and deleted = 0 and relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) r on upper(l.table_name_en) = upper(r.tablename) ) where rownum <= 8 order by tableCount desc
select count(distinct PLATFORM) as registerPlatformCount, sum(INTERFACE_NUM) as registerServiceCount,sum(SUMTOTAL) as publishServiceInfoCount from DGN_PUYUANMESSAGEBUS
